nodes.title: Backend (Hono.js API)
nodes.description: REST API server: auth.ts (3 routes), api.ts (186 routes), dashboard.ts (1 route), enhancements.ts (12 routes). Total: 202 unique routes. PostgreSQL with 61 tables.

nodes.title: Frontend (Angular 19)
nodes.description: Angular 19 SPA with 30 pages under /pages/. Uses PrimeNG components. AuthGuard protects all /biz/:bizId routes.
